title: Public Rental Scheme - Joint Singles Scheme (JSS)
text:
Public Rental Scheme - Joint Singles Scheme (JSS) - SupportGoWhere
Public Rental Scheme - Joint Singles Scheme (JSS)
Share link
Provides heavily subsidised flats for Singaporeans who are single and have no other housing options and no family support.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Subsidised rental flat from HDB
Apply online via HDB's website
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Subsidised rental flat from HDB

Who is this for?

You and your proposed applicant(s) must be singles. Any of the following is considered as singles:

Unmarried, divorced, or legally separated from spouse, and at least 35 years old

Widowed or orphaned, and at least 21 years old

Singapore Citizens

No family support and no other housing options. HDB will assess this based on your individual circumstances such as your income, and housing budget

Not existing HDB flat owners, essential occupiers, tenants under HDB’s rental schemes or private property owners

How to apply?

Understand the eligibility criteria and apply online at HDB InfoWEB.

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Branch Service Line: 6225-5432

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 16 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
